name: Idol World
description:
300 Idols, One Bot. Welcome to Idol World!

This bot features 300 female K-pop idols from second-, third-, fourth-, and fifth-generation. To see the full list, check the attached lorebook "Idol List".

UPDATE III:

Some of the younger Idols have to take a break from their adventures in Idol World. To replace the losses, the following groups join the roster: Wonder Girls, f(x), miss A, Sistar and soloist BoA. The Idol List already reflects the changes.

Also fixed the picture... no more 3 legged idols 🫣

How to play:

When requesting an idol, I recommend always using the spelling provided in the Idol List and ideally including the group name, to make it easier for the bot to find the correct entry.

JLLM isn't well equipped to handle a bot of this nature, so it might mess up and you need to help it out a little. More advanced LLMs like DeepSeek will provide a better experience.
